name: Switch → Control
description: This action allows you to control a switch with more flexibility than the basic `turn_on` and `turn_off` actions. It accepts a templatable `state` parameter, making it useful when the desired switch state is determined dynamically.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The ID of the switch to control.

config_entries.label: State
config_entries.description: The state to set the switch to. `true` turns the switch on, `false` turns it off.
